title: Orchard Toys Little Bug Bingo - Compact Mini Games for Boys, Girls, and Toddlers - Matching Games for 3+ Year Olds - Holiday Travel Games for Kids - 2-4 Players
features: BINGO GAME FOR KIDS: This colourful bingo game features a variety of adorable bugs for children to identify. Match the bug on the picture to one on your board and cover it with a counter. The first to cover all the pictures on their board wins.

CHILDREN'S GAMES: This minibeast mini game provides an entertaining matching and memory activity suitable for children aged 3 to 6 years. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Choking hazard.

SUSTAINABLE: Crafted from durable, recycled board and manufactured to exceptionally high standards to withstand the wear and tear of little hands. Orchard Toys games conveniently wipe clean, ensuring they're always ready for the next playtime.

EDUCATIONAL BENEFITS: Our fun, teacher-tested Little Bug Bingo game is an invaluable educational toy for 3+ year olds that encourages matching and memory skills, observational skills, and personal and social skills.
CONTENTS: Each of the Little Bug Bingo Mini Games includes 4 bingo boards, 20 picture cards, 34 leaf counters, and an instruction leaflet. For 2 to 4 players.

KIDS TRAVEL GAMES: Whether you're looking for plane activities for kids or entertaining holiday essentials, this compact kids game ensures hours of fun on the go. Explore the wider selection of Orchard Toys Mini Games for more travel game ideas.

ORCHARD TOYS: We've been designing educational games and jigsaw puzzles for kids for over 50 years. Trusted by parents, teachers, and childcare specialists, our high quality products will stand the test of time for generations to come.
description: From the manufacturer Mini Travel Games Smaller than any of our other games, these travel size mini games are perfect for fun and learning both at home and away. Based on traditional gameplay and covering a range of learning skills from matching to counting, mini games will provide fun for all the family. Mini games are the perfect gift and make great stocking fillers. Key Features Travel Size Mini games are packed in small, compact box - the perfect size to pack in a suitcase, travel bag or handbag! Engaging Gameplay All of the mini games feature quick and simple yet engaging gameplay, great for keeping children entertained for short periods when at home or away. Fun Characters Children will love the range of colourful animal, dinosaur and insect characters featured in the mini games - all of which help to make learning fun! Orchard Toys Mini Games Range About Orchard Toys Orchard Toys have been making educational games and jigsaws in Britain for over 50 years. The emphasis is on ‘learning made fun’, meaning parents can benefit from Orchard Toys trusted educational values whilst children will have so much fun they’ll want to play time and time again. Orchard Toys products will stand the test of time against constant playing, wear and tear and messy hands.
